title: Presented 3 Papers at SCI 2026 — Hanoi, Vietnam
body_md:
Traveled to Hanoi, Vietnam to present three accepted papers at the 8th International Conference on Smart Computing and Informatics (SCI 2026), hosted by Swinburne University Vietnam.

**Papers presented:**

1. *Adaptive PQC Key-Encapsulation for High-Reliability Multipath QUIC Telemetry* — a quantum-resistant communication framework using NIST Level-3 lattice-based KEM over multipath QUIC for mission-critical networks.

2. *LLM-Based Courtroom Simulation for Exploring Indian Civil Law Cases* — a multi-agent LLM platform for structured legal analysis of Indian civil law corpora, reducing manual review time by 75%.

3. *GANs in Urban Digital Twins: Systematic Review and Architecture for Policy Simulation* — a systematic literature review across 40+ papers and a proposed GAN-based simulation architecture for data-constrained cities.

Received a Certificate of Appreciation from Swinburne University for the presentations. The conference brought together researchers from across Southeast Asia and beyond.
image_caption: SCI 2026 · Swinburne University Vietnam · Hanoi · April 2026

title: Group 61 Secures 1st Rank in PBL-2 — CS Department
body_md:
Group 61 secured 1st Rank in PBL-2 (Project-Based Learning, Phase 2) across the entire Computer Science department at Symbiosis Institute of Technology, Pune.

The evaluation was conducted by an independent jury of industry experts — not faculty — which makes this result especially meaningful. The jury assessed technical depth, real-world applicability, and presentation quality across all CS department teams.

**Team:** Anshul Ravindra Mandekar, Avi S Gupta, Aman Vats, Mayank Rajesh Hete.
image_caption: PBL-2 Award Ceremony · SIT Pune · May 2025
